summary: Successfully tested all 5 Timeline Visualizer fixes - years display as plain numbers, scroll wheel zoom, axis-only click-to-add, dark D&D fantasy theme with thumbnails, and sub-timeline editable axis
passed_tests: Years display as plain numbers without BCE/CE suffix (e.g. '-3000', '-2800')
Scroll wheel zoom functionality with hint text 'Scroll to zoom'
Timeline axis has proper clickable hitbox with data-testid='timeline-axis'
Click on axis opens Add New Event form with proper form fields
Dark D&D fantasy theme with dark brown background (#1e160d) and golden accents
Theme toggle works between Fantasy and Sci-Fi modes
Event thumbnails display as circular images (8 thumbnails found)
Events without images show title and year labels correctly
Event card expansion shows dark themed card with images
Period bars expand to show sub-timelines with proper animations
Sub-timeline shows 'Click line to add sub-event' hint text
Sub-timeline axis has clickable hitbox with data-testid
Clicking sub-timeline axis opens 'Add Sub-Event' form
Timeline picker element exists for switching between timelines
Zoom control buttons work (+ and - buttons found and functional)
